title: MARA Announces Bitcoin Production and Mining Operation Updates for December 2024
text: MARA surpassed its year-end hash rate target of 50 EH/s while improving fleet efficiency to 20 J/TH. The energized hash rate increased to 53.2 EH/s, a 15% improvement over November, while BTC production declined 2% to 890 BTC, primarily due to a slight decrease in luck. MARA mined 249 blocks, the second most blocks in a month on record. The company achieved its ambitious 50 EH/s target ahead of schedule and improved efficiency metrics.
